article_title: Mayor's Task Force on Burnaby Economic Growth and Resilience — May 14, 2026

agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to consider final economic growth recommendations
agenda_briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on final recommendations from Workshop #8 on economic growth and resilience. These proposed recommendations could lead to new policies or bylaw changes affecting local businesses. The agenda item covers a review of previous workshops, report writing, and discussion of next steps. A final decision has not been made yet — this is a proposal under consideration.
agenda_briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — these recommendations could lead to new rules or programs affecting your business.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
5. WORKSHOP # 8 - FINAL RECOMMENDATIONS
5.1 Chair's Address
5.2 Icebreaker
5.3 Review of Previous Workshop
5.4 Report Writing
5.5 Discussion
5.6 Next Steps and Closing Remarks
